name: simple-config-builder
documentation:
# config

[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/config.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/simple_config_builder)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/config.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/simple_config_builder)

-----

## Table of Contents

- [Installation](#installation)
- [License](#license)

## Installation

```console
pip install simple_config_builder
```

## License

`simple_config_builder` is distributed under the terms of the [MIT](https://spdx.org/licenses/MIT.html) license.

modules.name: simple_config_builder.configparser
documentation:
The configparser module.

The module contains the configparser class. The configparser class is used to
parse the configuration file and construct the configuration objects.
It gives the ability to autosave the configuration file when the configuration
objects are updated.

The Configparser class is used to parse the configuration file and
construct the configuration objects. It gives the ability to autosave
the configuration file when the configuration objects are updated.

modules.name: simple_config_builder.config
documentation: Test implementation of a config class decorator and a registry.

functions.name: simple_config_builder.config.configclass
documentation:
Make a Configclass from a standard class with attributes.

This decorator adds the following functionality:
- Registers the class with Config
- Adds a _config_class_type attribute to the class
- Convert a to a pyserde class for serialization and deserialization
- Adds property methods for fields with constraints which
are defined using the config_field decorator.

Args:
    class_to_register: The class to register with Config.

functions.name: simple_config_builder.config.config_field
documentation: Create a field with constraints.
